text: Moving from the quiet, industrial hallway into the vibrant and thought-provoking exhibit, I feel a shift from solitude to curiosity. The first scene feels almost sterile, echoing with utilitarian necessity—fire extinguishers and emergency signage, a faint anticipation of uncertainty or danger. The second image, in contrast, bursts with ideas and color, inviting engagement and reflection. Among the words and screens of the R+D exhibit, I am both a spectator and a participant in a larger conversation about human progress and innovation. I feel invigorated, yet slightly overwhelmed by the sheer potential on display.
